# kdev


## workflow

1. official_5.10.66 (official kernel 5.10.66)
    * official_5.10.66_image
    * official_5.10.66_kernel
2. ophub_6.6.y (ophub kernel 6.6.y)
    * ophub_6.6.y_image
    * ophub_6.6.y_kernel
3. armbian_rk-6.1-rkr5.1 (armbian kernel rk-6.1-rkr5.1)
    * armbian_rk-6.1-rkr5.1_image
    * armbian_rk-6.1-rkr5.1_kernel

## kdevbuild

1. official_5.10.66 (official kernel 5.10.66)
    * official_5.10.66_image.sh
   * official_5.10.66_kernel.sh
2. ophub_6.6.y (ophub kernel 6.6.y)
    * ophub_6.6.y_image.sh
    * ophub_6.6.y_kernel.sh
3. armbian_rk-6.1-rkr5.1 (armbian kernel rk-6.1-rkr5.1)
   * armbian_rk-6.1-rkr5.1_image.sh
   * armbian_rk-6.1-rkr5.1_kernel.sh

## kernel

1. official_5.10.66 (official kernel 5.10.66)
   * Image
   * decenta_rk3588.dtb
   * config-5.10.66-kdev
   * System.map-5.10.66-kdev
   * kos.tar.gz
2. ophub_6.6.y (ophub kernel 6.6.y)
   * Image
   * decenta_rk3588.dtb
   * config-6.6.y-kdev
   * System.map-6.6.y-kdev
   * kos.tar.gz

## image

1. official_5.10.66 (official kernel 5.10.66)
   * decenta_5.10.66_${set_rootfs}
2. ophub_6.6.y (ophub kernel 6.6.y)
   * decenta_6.6.y_${set_rootfs}
